name: Crockpot Barbecue Pork
recipeIngredient: 1 bottle of your favorite barbecue sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Place onion slices at the bottom of a large crockpot.
2. Dot the pork roast with cloves.
3. Place the roast in the crockpot along with the water.
4. Cover and cook for at least 8 hours (or overnight).
5. Remove the roast from the crockpot, discard the cloves and onion slices.
6. Shred the pork and place it back into the crockpot.
7. Add barbecue sauce and sugar.
8. Cover and cook for at least 2 more hours.
9. Serve shredded pork on toasted buns with slices of fresh onion, if desired.
